desc: Cannot be Normal Summoned/Set. Must first be Special Summoned by its own effect. If you called the coin toss right for the effect of "Time Wizard": You can Tribute 1 "Dark Magician" in your Monster Zone; Special Summon this card from your hand or Deck. If Special Summoned this way: Add 1 Spell from your Deck to your hand.
